debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] LogbookBridge received title=' + $p.$title
'[GT Redistribute] AcceptLogbook ships=' + $shipNameLabel

set_value.name: $probeMsg
set_value.exact: 'PE probe watch add ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none')

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] ' + $probeMsg

set_value.name: $probeMsg
set_value.exact: 'PE probe watch remove ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none')

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] ' + $probeMsg

'[GT Redistribute] Cleared stale PE markers ship=' + $shipId + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none') + ' closedSessions=' + $closedSessions + ' removedFromLists=' + $removedFromLists

do_if.value: $shipId? and $shipId != '' and $excludeSessionKey != '' and global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys? and global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE stillInPlan ship=' + $shipId + ' exclude=' + (if $excludeSessionKey != '' then $excludeSessionKey else 'none') + ' result=' + $stillIn

do_if.value: ($ifSess.$left == $shipId or $ifSess.$right == $shipId) and ($ifSess.$awaitingSettlement? and $ifSess.$awaitingSettlement) and not ($ifSess.$swapCompleted? and $ifSess.$swapCompleted)

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE advance scan ship=' + $shipId + ' hasShip=' + $advHasShip + ' exists=' + (@$advShip.exists) + ' docked=' + (if @$advShip.exists and $advShip.dock? then 'dock' else (if @$advShip.exists and $advShip.parkedat? then 'parked' else 'no')) + ' sessions=' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys? and global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys.count? then global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys.count else 0)

do_if.value: $shipId? and $shipId != '' and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap? and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap.{'$' + $shipId}? and global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys? and global.$GT_PilotExchange_SessionKeys.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE advance sess key=' + $advKey + ' L=' + $advSess.$left + ' R=' + $advSess.$right + ' LA=' + (if $advSess.$leftArrived? then $advSess.$leftArrived else false) + ' RA=' + (if $advSess.$rightArrived? then $advSess.$rightArrived else false) + ' att=' + (if $advSess.$swapAttempted? then $advSess.$swapAttempted else false) + ' comp=' + (if $advSess.$swapCompleted? then $advSess.$swapCompleted else false)

do_if.value: ($advSess.$left == $shipId or $advSess.$right == $shipId) and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{$advRef}.$leftArrived and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{$advRef}.$rightArrived and not (global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{$advRef}.$swapAttempted? and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{$advRef}.$swapAttempted)

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE advance trigger key=' + $advKey + ' via ship=' + $shipId
'[GT Redistribute] PE advance deferred key=' + $advKey + ' via ship=' + $shipId + ' leftInFlight=' + $advLeftInFlight + ' rightInFlight=' + $advRightInFlight

do_if.value: not $stationId? or $stationId == '' or not $ship? or not $ship.exists

set_value.name: $watchLeftObj
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftObj? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftObj else null

set_value.name: $watchRightObj
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightObj? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightObj else null

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE session closed key=' + $sessionKey + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none')

do_if.value: $sessionKey? and $sessionKey != '' and $goneId? and $goneId != '' and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions? and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}?

set_value.name: $partnerObj
set_value.exact: if $goneIsLeft then (if $teardownSess.$rightObj? then $teardownSess.$rightObj else null) else (if $teardownSess.$leftObj? then $teardownSess.$leftObj else null)

set_value.name: $goneObj
set_value.exact: if $goneIsLeft then (if $teardownSess.$leftObj? then $teardownSess.$leftObj else null) else (if $teardownSess.$rightObj? then $teardownSess.$rightObj else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE partner released after loss gone=' + $goneId + ' partner=' + $partnerId + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none')
'[GT Redistribute] PE partner kept after loss gone=' + $goneId + ' partner=' + $partnerId + ' hasOtherLeg=' + $partnerHasOtherLeg + ' exists=' + (@$partnerObj.exists)

do_if.value: not @$leftShip.exists and $left != '' and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap? and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap.{'$' + $left}?
not @$rightShip.exists and $right != '' and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap? and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap.{'$' + $right}?

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE advance-check left=' + $finishLeftId + ' leftStill=' + $leftStillInMultiswap + ' right=' + $finishRightId + ' rightStill=' + $rightStillInMultiswap + ' markSwap=' + $markSwapCompleted

'[GT Redistribute] PE pair finished left=' + $left + ' right=' + $right + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none') + ' releaseDock=' + $releaseDock + ' closeSession=' + $closeSession + ' markSwapCompleted=' + $markSwapCompleted
'[GT Redistribute] Skipping dock order for left=' + $leftId + ' (already active/queued)'
'[GT Redistribute] Skipping dock order for right=' + $rightId + ' (already active/queued)'

'[GT Redistribute] Assigned DockAndPilotExchange left=' + $leftId + '@' + $leftStationId + ' sector=' + (if $leftStation.sector? then $leftStation.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' right=' + $rightId + '@' + $rightStationId + ' sector=' + (if $rightStation.sector? then $rightStation.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' leftNeedsOrder=' + $leftNeedsOrder + ' rightNeedsOrder=' + $rightNeedsOrder + ' immediate=' + $immediate

'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders failed: ' + $failReason + ' left=' + $leftId + '@' + $leftStationId + ' right=' + $rightId + '@' + $rightStationId + ' leftSector=' + (if $leftShip.sector? then $leftShip.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' rightSector=' + (if $rightShip.sector? then $rightShip.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN')

set_value.name: $sessPartnerExpected
set_value.exact: if $s.$ShipID == $sessionLeftId then $sessionRightId else if $s.$ShipID == $sessionRightId then $sessionLeftId else ''

raise_lua_event.name: 'gt.executePilotSwap'
raise_lua_event.param: global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$left + '|' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$right + '|' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftUid? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftUid else '') + '|' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightUid? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightUid else '')

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE session trigger key=' + $sessionKey + ' left=' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$left + ' right=' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$right
'[GT Redistribute] PE session deferred key=' + $sessionKey + ' leftInFlight=' + $peLeftInFlight + ' rightInFlight=' + $peRightInFlight

do_if.value: ($s.$State == 'aborted' or $s.$State == 'released') and $sessionKey != '' and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions? and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}?

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE order_state:' + $s.$State + ' ignored (live dock/swap activity) ship=' + $s.$ShipID + ' session=' + $sessionKey

do_if.value: ($s.$State == 'failed' or ($s.$State == 'released' and not $skipPeTerminalTeardown) or ($s.$State == 'aborted' and not $skipPeTerminalTeardown))

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE cancelled ignored (live or completed swap) ship=' + $s.$ShipID + ' session=' + $sessionKey

set_value.name: $probeMsg
set_value.exact: 'PE probe event_control_entity_added ship=' + $shipId + ' entity=' + $entityName + ' (' + $entityId + ')' + ' session=' + (if $sessionKey != '' then $sessionKey else 'NONE') + ' partner=' + (if $partnerId != '' then $partnerId else 'NONE') + ' swapAttempted=' + $swapAttempted + ' swapCompleted=' + $swapCompleted + ' leftArrived=' + $leftArrived + ' rightArrived=' + $rightArrived + ' pilot=' + $pilotName + ' assignedpilot=' + $assignedPilotName + ' entityIsPilot=' + $entityMatchesPilot + ' entityIsAssignedPilot=' + $entityMatchesAssignedPilot

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] ' + $probeMsg
'[GT Redistribute] PE ship destroyed lost=' + $lostId + ' session=' + $lk
'[GT Redistribute] PE settlement watch registered left=' + $leftId + ' right=' + $rightId

do_if.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.keys? and global.$GT_Ships.keys.count gt 0

$ship? and $ship.exists and $ship.idcode? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange and not $reconcileSeen.{'$' + $ship.idcode}?

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh received left=' + $p.$left + ' right=' + $p.$right + ' attempt=' + $attempt

set_value.name: $leftPilot
set_value.exact: if $leftShip? and $leftShip.exists and $leftShip.pilot? and $leftShip.pilot.exists then $leftShip.pilot else null

set_value.name: $rightPilot
set_value.exact: if $rightShip? and $rightShip.exists and $rightShip.pilot? and $rightShip.pilot.exists then $rightShip.pilot else null
